IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: THE CHARTER SCHOOL HAS CLOSED THEIR DOORS AT THE END OF THE PRIOR FISCAL YEAR (JUNE 30, 2023).
IRS990.Desc: THE CHARTER SCHOOL HAS CLOSED THEIR DOORS AT THE END OF THE PRIOR FISCAL YEAR (JUNE 30, 2023).

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SCHOOL PUBLICIZES ITS NONDISCRIMINATORY POLICY THROUGH ADVERTISEMENTS IN LOCAL NEWSPAPERS FOR BOTH STUDENT AND STAFF RECRUITMENT. OUTREACH IN DIVERSE COMMUNITIES DURING STUDENT RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES ARE EVIDENCED IN STUDENT ENROLLMENT.
RACIAL COMPOSITION OF STUDENTS IS RECORDED BUT NOT STAFF/FAC. HHLA IS A FREE PUBLIC CHARTER SCHOOL, NO FINANCIAL AID IS PROVIDED.
HHLA RECEIVES GOVERNMENT FUNDING IN THE FORM OF GOVERNMENT GRANTS.

DispositionOfAssetsDetail.AssetsDistriOrExpnssPaidDesc: TCL 43-INCH CLASS 4-SERIES 4K UHD HDR SMART ANDROID TV - 43S434, 2021 MODEL

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: STATEN ISLAND HEBREW PUBLIC CHARTER SCHOOL

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: HARLEM HEBREW LANGUAGE ACADEMY CHARTER SCHOOL PROVIDES ITS STUDENTS WITH THE ACADEMIC AND PERSONAL FOUNDATION NECESSARY TO SUCCESSFULLY PURSUE ADVANCED STUDIES AND ACHIEVE CONTINUED PERSONAL GROWTH AS ETHICAL AND INFORMED GLOBAL CITIZENS. IN ORDER TO ACCOMPLISH THIS, HARLEM HEBREW OFFERS AN ACADEMICALLY RIGOROUS K-8 CURRICULUM WHICH INCLUDES INTENSIVE INSTRUCTION IN THE HEBREW LANGUAGE. STUDENTS IN A DIVERSE STUDENT BODY ALSO DEVELOP A STRONG SENSE OF SOCIAL AND CIVIC RESPONSIBILITY THROUGH THE INTEGRATION OF SERVICE LEARNING AND COMMUNITY SERVICE ACROSS THE CURRICULUM. THE FUNDAMENTAL OBJECTIVE OF HARLEM HEBREW IS TO PREPARE ITS STUDENTS ACADEMICALLY AND PERSONALLY TO ACHIEVE THEIR FULL POTENTIAL IN LIFE.
THE CHARTER SCHOOL HAS CLOSED THEIR DOORS AT THE END OF THE PRIOR FISCAL YEAR (JUNE 30, 2023).

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 3
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SCHOOL UTILIZES AN OUTSIDE CHARTER MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATION (CMO) SERVICE TO PERFORM DAY TO DAY ACCOUNTING AND DAILY MANAGERIAL AND FINANCIAL DUTIES OF A CFO THAT WOULD HAVE NORMALLY BEEN PERFORMED BY AN EMPLOYEE OF THE SCHOOL. ELYSE CASTELLANO IS AN EMPLOYEE OF THE CMO AGENCY AND WAS NOT PAID DIRECTLY BY THE SCHOOL FOR WORK PERFORMED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FINANCE COMMITTEE REVIEWS THE 990, AND REPORTS TO THE GOVERNING BODY ON THEIR REVIEW AND APPROVAL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THERE IS AN ANNUAL REVIEW OF THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY. EMPLOYEES HAVE AN OBLIGATION TO CONDUCT THEIR AFFAIRS WITHIN GUIDELINES THAT PROHIBIT ACTUAL OR POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST. IF HHLA FINDS THAT ANY EMPLOYEES HAVE ENGAGED IN ANY CONDUCT WHICH PRESENTS A CONFLICT OF INTEREST WITH HHLA, SUCH EMPLOYEE IS SUBJECT TO DISCIPLINE, UP TO AND INCLUDING TERMINATION OF EMPLOYMENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A COMMITTEE OF THE BOARD EVALUATES THE HEAD OF SCHOOL'S COMPENSATION IN CONJUNCTION WITH INFORMATION AVAILABLE REGARDING COMPARABLE POSITIONS. THE COMMITTEE UTILIZES SALARY INFORMATION FROM OTHER CHARTER SCHOOLS IN ITS DETERMINATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: HHLA MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.
THE BOARD HAS NOT CHANGED ITS PROCESS FOR SELECTING THE INDEPENDENT AUDITOR NOR HAVE THEY CHANGED THE OVERSIGHT OF THE AUDIT FROM PRIOR YEARS.
